g.text: Inter-Lab eBGP (FRR on transport nodes, RFC1918 filtering)
NAC: 802.1X/MAC-auth with RADIUS on NAD devices
CHI-STL-DFW / SEA-SFO-LAX: OSPF underlay + eBGP EVPN overlay + VXLAN (6 VNIs) + 3 VRFs + DHCP (vCX)
JFK-RDU-MIA: EC-V serves clients directly on lan0/lan1/lan2 with per-segment DHCP pools (no OSPF/BGP/VXLAN)
